name: OpenAI Codex
subscription_auth_support: Codex can be used through ChatGPT subscription access on supported ChatGPT plans, or with API-key billing.
description: OpenAI coding agent available as CLI, IDE integrations, web, desktop, and cloud tasks.
notes: Use this as the baseline reference for what “ChatGPT subscription auth” means in the Codex ecosystem.

name: Codex App Server
subscription_auth_support: Provides local agent runtime/app-server primitives that can authenticate through ChatGPT-managed auth modes.
description: Protocol/runtime used by apps to run Codex-backed coding agents with managed authentication, tools, and events.
notes: Important infrastructure layer behind many “Sign in with ChatGPT” agent integrations.

name: Codex IDE integrations
subscription_auth_support: OpenAI documents ChatGPT sign-in for Codex IDE integrations.
description: Official Codex integrations for supported IDEs and editor workflows.
notes: Exact feature set varies by IDE and integration.

name: Codex GitHub integration
subscription_auth_support: Codex can review code and work with GitHub repositories from the Codex product surface.
description: Official Codex integration for GitHub code review and repository workflows.
notes: Useful to include because many third-party tools are trying to replicate or extend this workflow.

name: Codex plugin for Claude Code
subscription_auth_support: Delegates selected Claude Code work to local Codex, using the user’s existing Codex authentication.
description: OpenAI plugin that lets Claude Code call Codex for reviews, delegation, and related workflows.
notes: Requires Claude Code plus local Codex setup.

name: Xcode coding intelligence
auth: Sign in with a ChatGPT account
subscription_auth_support: Apple documents Codex setup with ChatGPT account sign-in or API key.
description: Apple Xcode coding intelligence and agent workflows with Codex support.
notes: Requires supported Xcode versions and regional/account availability.

name: JetBrains IDEs / AI Assistant Codex
subscription_auth_support: JetBrains documents Codex usage via ChatGPT account, OpenAI API key, or JetBrains AI subscription.
description: Codex integration for IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, and other JetBrains IDEs.
notes: Feature availability may differ between IDEs and JetBrains AI plans.

name: Zed
subscription_auth_support: Zed documents signing in with a ChatGPT account and running OpenAI models through Zed’s agent with Codex usage.
description: Code editor with built-in agent workflows and ChatGPT subscription/Codex support.
notes: Remote-project support and billing behavior may differ from local projects.

name: OpenCode
subscription_auth_support: OpenCode documents connecting OpenAI and selecting ChatGPT Plus/Pro.
description: Open-source terminal coding agent with multiple model providers and OpenAI subscription login support.
notes: Also has third-party Codex-auth plugins listed below.

name: Cline
auth: OpenAI API key through other providers
subscription_auth_support: Cline documents OpenAI Codex OAuth: sign in with OpenAI, no API key required, with model access depending on plan.
description: VS Code AI coding assistant with OpenAI Codex OAuth support.
notes: Availability and model list can change with Cline and OpenAI plan updates.

name: Roo Code
subscription_auth_support: Roo Code documents an OpenAI – ChatGPT Plus/Pro provider using OAuth, without an API key.
description: Agentic coding extension with a ChatGPT Plus/Pro provider.
notes: Use provider docs to confirm current model availability and plan requirements.

name: Kilo Code
subscription_auth_support: Kilo Code documents using a ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription with OAuth and no separate API key.
description: AI coding agent/extension with OpenAI ChatGPT Plus/Pro provider support.
notes: Docs note usage counts against subscription limits and that some Kilo products may not support this provider.

name: Pi
subscription_auth_support: Pi documents ChatGPT Plus/Pro (Codex) as a login provider for its coding agent.
description: Composable AI agent/coding-agent toolkit with subscription login providers.
notes: Stores local auth state; review docs before using on shared machines.

name: OpenClaw
subscription_auth_support: OpenClaw documents ChatGPT/Codex subscription setup through OpenAI Codex OAuth and the Codex app-server runtime.
description: Local agentic automation interface that can use Codex-backed OpenAI models through subscription auth.
notes: Docs distinguish between Codex OAuth/subscription auth and direct API-key mode.

name: Hermes Agent
subscription_auth_support: Hermes documents OpenAI Codex provider support and running agent turns through a ChatGPT subscription with Codex app-server runtime.
description: Terminal agent runtime with Codex provider and app-server integration.
notes: Useful for users who want Codex-style app-server behavior inside an extensible local agent.

name: Open CoDesign
subscription_auth_support: Project releases describe ChatGPT Plus/Codex subscription login/OAuth support for using an existing subscription as model budget.
description: Open-source AI design/coding workflow project with Codex subscription login mentions in releases.
notes: Verify current setup instructions before relying on it; support may be release-specific.

name: codex-discord
subscription_auth_support: Project describes remote-controlling Codex through Discord with no API key needed and running on a Codex subscription.
description: Discord-based remote control bridge for Codex sessions.
notes: Be careful exposing coding-agent control over chat platforms; review permissions and command safeguards.

name: opencode-openai-codex-auth
subscription_auth_support: Plugin describes OpenAI Codex access in OpenCode through ChatGPT OAuth instead of API keys.
description: OpenCode plugin/provider for OpenAI Codex OAuth authentication.
notes: Third-party adapter; review token storage and project activity.

name: @openhax/codex for OpenCode
subscription_auth_support: Plugin describes enabling OpenCode to use OpenAI Codex through ChatGPT Plus/Pro OAuth.
description: OpenCode plugin that routes OpenCode requests to Codex-backed OpenAI models.
notes: Third-party adapter; verify compatibility with the current OpenCode provider API.

name: codex-acp
subscription_auth_support: Zed’s Codex ACP adapter documents ChatGPT subscription authentication for local use.
description: Agent Client Protocol adapter for running Codex inside Zed and other ACP-compatible clients.
notes: Docs note limitations around remote projects.

name: llm-openai-via-codex
subscription_auth_support: LLM plugin that uses an installed/authenticated Codex CLI session to access Codex-available models.
description: Simon Willison’s LLM plugin for accessing OpenAI models through local Codex auth.
notes: Experimental and dependent on local Codex behavior; do not treat as a stable public API.

name: ai-sub-auth
subscription_auth_support: Library describes reusing AI subscriptions and includes OpenAI Codex/ChatGPT subscription auth.
description: Developer library for subscription-auth integrations across AI providers.
notes: Review security model carefully before embedding in apps.

name: pi-codex-search
auth: ChatGPT Plus/Pro Codex subscription via Pi
subscription_auth_support: Pi package page describes reusing a ChatGPT Plus/Pro Codex subscription for web search in Pi agents.
description: Pi extension that adds Codex-backed web search capabilities.
notes: Requires Pi’s provider setup first.

name: @llblab/pi-codex-usage
subscription_auth_support: Pi package page describes summarizing Codex subscription usage inside Pi workflows.
description: Pi utility extension for Codex usage tracking.
notes: Utility rather than a full app; useful companion for subscription-auth users.

name: claude-gpt-image-bridge
subscription_auth_support: Project describes using Codex CLI and a ChatGPT subscription to generate GPT images from Claude Code.
description: Bridge for image generation workflows from Claude Code through Codex/ChatGPT subscription auth.
notes: Experimental image bridge; check terms, model availability, and output rights.

name: chatgpt-imagegen
subscription_auth_support: Project describes generating images from the command line using a ChatGPT subscription and no API key.
description: Command-line image generation tool that uses ChatGPT/Codex auth paths.
notes: Project itself warns about undocumented/internal endpoints; treat as experimental.

name: ChatMock
subscription_auth_support: Project describes signing in with ChatGPT and serving an OpenAI-compatible API locally.
description: Local OpenAI-compatible API server backed by ChatGPT subscription auth.
notes: Proxy/API-shim tools are high-risk: review provider terms, token handling, and whether public serving is allowed.

name: GPTMock
subscription_auth_support: Fork/variant of ChatMock-style local API approach using ChatGPT subscription login.
description: OpenAI-compatible local API shim backed by ChatGPT subscription auth.
notes: Proxy/API-shim tools are high-risk; verify legality, terms, and security before use.

name: gptAnywhere
subscription_auth_support: Project describes programmatic access to OpenAI models through a ChatGPT subscription.
description: Tooling for programmatic/local access paths backed by ChatGPT subscription auth.
notes: Experimental proxy-style access path; confirm it does not rely on brittle or disallowed automation, token handling, or provider terms for your use case.

name: CCProxy API
subscription_auth_support: Project describes a local reverse proxy with OpenAI Codex/ChatGPT backend support and OAuth for paid accounts.
description: Unified local API proxy for coding-agent subscriptions and providers.
notes: Good candidate for advanced local use; not a substitute for reviewing provider terms and security.

name: CLIProxyAPI
subscription_auth_support: Project describes wrapping CLI tools and using existing OAuth subscription auth for API-style access.
description: Proxy that exposes local CLI agents/tools as API-like endpoints.
notes: General-purpose CLI proxy; verify current OpenAI/Codex support before listing as fully supported.

name: Codex-LB
subscription_auth_support: Project describes a load balancer/proxy for ChatGPT accounts.
description: Load-balancer/proxy layer for multiple ChatGPT/Codex accounts.
notes: Listed for visibility only. Account pooling, shared credentials, resale, or quota-bypass use may violate provider terms. Do not use for abuse or public resale.
